input: Write 3 LinkedIn post variations about launching a new AI consulting service for small businesses. Goal: get founders to DM me.
criteria: produces exactly 3 labeled variations (A, B, C or 1, 2, 3)
each variation has a strong hook on the first line (not starting with 'I am excited to announce')
at least one variation uses a personal story or specific result
at least one variation uses a numbered list or bullet format
each variation ends with a CTA that drives DMs (not just 'follow me')
no corporate filler or cliche opener in any variation
judge_prompt: You are evaluating LinkedIn post variations written by an AI writing assistant. Score 0-10. Full marks: all 3 variations present, each with a scroll-stopping hook, at least one story-based and one list-based, each with a DM-driving CTA, all under 300 words. Deduct 2 points if fewer than 3 variations. Deduct 1 per variation with a weak opener. Deduct 1 per variation missing a CTA.
